full_text:
Chang Jing 常静
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chang Jing (常静)was born in Wen county, Henei commandery. Inherited peerage after older brother executed. Chang Jing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
